name: veroptima-qa-code-vue
description: Standalone public-MIT Vue (vue-compiler) code-enumerator backend — a parser-driven (@vue/compiler-sfc + @babel/parser + pug-lexer/pug-parser) branch enumerator for .vue SFCs (HTML + Pug templates, element-plus + vee-validate). Typechecks against @qa-expert/code-enumerator-contract and passes its conformance suite with zero core edits.
